svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="Data Model (ERD)" id="0"> <mxGraphModel dx="-684" dy="-219" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1300" pageHeight="760" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="t_users" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=28;html=1;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;align=center;verticalAlign=top;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="auth.users" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="230" x="60" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t_users_r0" parent="t_users" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;spacingLeft=10;fontSize=12;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#dae8fc;fontStyle=1;fillColor=#eef3fb;" value="PK id : uuid" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="230" y="28" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t_users_r1" parent="t_users" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;spacingLeft=10;fontSize=12;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#dae8fc;" value="email : text" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="230" y="52" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t_users_r2" parent="t_users" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;spacingLeft=10;fontSize=12;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#dae8fc;" value="... : (managed)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="230" y="76" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t_prof" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=28;html=1;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;align=center;verticalAlign=top;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="profiles" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="196" width="320" x="470" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t_prof_r0" parent="t_prof" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;spacingLeft=10;fontSize=12;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#dae8fc;fontStyle=1;fillColor=#eef3fb;" value="PK id : uuid -> auth.users" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="320" y="28" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t_prof_r1" parent="t_prof" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;spacingLeft=10;fontSize=12;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#dae8fc;" value="display_name : text" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="320" y="52" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t_prof_r2" parent="t_prof" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;spacingLeft=10;fontSize=12;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#dae8fc;" value="units : ml | oz (display)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="320" y="76" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t_prof_r3" parent="t_prof" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;spacingLeft=10;fontSize=12;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#dae8fc;" value="daily_goal_ml : int" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="320" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t_prof_r4" parent="t_prof" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;spacingLeft=10;fontSize=12;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#dae8fc;" value="timezone : text (IANA) ★ canonical" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="320" y="124" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t_prof_r5" parent="t_prof" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;spacingLeft=10;fontSize=12;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#dae8fc;" value="created_at : timestamptz" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="320" y="148" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t_prof_r6" parent="t_prof" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;spacingLeft=10;fontSize=12;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#dae8fc;" value="updated_at : timestamptz" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="320" y="172" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t_intake" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=28;html=1;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;align=center;verticalAlign=top;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="intake_entries" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="172" width="300" x="60" y="430" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t_intake_r0" parent="t_intake" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;spacingLeft=10;fontSize=12;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#dae8fc;fontStyle=1;fillColor=#eef3fb;" value="PK id : uuid" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="300" y="28" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t_intake_r1" parent="t_intake" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;spacingLeft=10;fontSize=12;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#dae8fc;fontStyle=2;" value="FK user_id : uuid" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="300" y="52" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t_intake_r2" parent="t_intake" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;spacingLeft=10;fontSize=12;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#dae8fc;" value="amount_ml : int > 0" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="300" y="76" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t_intake_r3" parent="t_intake" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;spacingLeft=10;fontSize=12;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#dae8fc;" value="logged_at : timestamptz" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="300" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t_intake_r4" parent="t_intake" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;spacingLeft=10;fontSize=12;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#dae8fc;" value="source : text" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="300" y="124" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t_intake_r5" parent="t_intake" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;spacingLeft=10;fontSize=12;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#dae8fc;" value="created_at : timestamptz" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="300" y="148" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t_rem" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=28;html=1;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;align=center;verticalAlign=top;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="reminder_settings" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="268" width="320" x="470" y="410" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t_rem_r0" parent="t_rem" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;spacingLeft=10;fontSize=12;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#dae8fc;fontStyle=2;" value="PK/FK user_id : uuid" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="320" y="28" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t_rem_r1" parent="t_rem" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;spacingLeft=10;fontSize=12;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#dae8fc;" value="enabled : bool" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="320" y="52" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t_rem_r2" parent="t_rem" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;spacingLeft=10;fontSize=12;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#dae8fc;" value="mode : interval | times" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="320" y="76" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t_rem_r3" parent="t_rem" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;spacingLeft=10;fontSize=12;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#dae8fc;" value="interval_minutes : int" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="320" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t_rem_r4" parent="t_rem" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;spacingLeft=10;fontSize=12;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#dae8fc;" value="times : time[]" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="320" y="124" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t_rem_r5" parent="t_rem" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;spacingLeft=10;fontSize=12;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#dae8fc;" value="window_start : time" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="320" y="148" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t_rem_r6" parent="t_rem" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;spacingLeft=10;fontSize=12;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#dae8fc;" value="window_end : time" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="320" y="172" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t_rem_r7" parent="t_rem" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;spacingLeft=10;fontSize=12;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#dae8fc;" value="quiet_start : time" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="320" y="196" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t_rem_r8" parent="t_rem" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;spacingLeft=10;fontSize=12;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#dae8fc;" value="quiet_end : time" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="320" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t_rem_r9" parent="t_rem" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;spacingLeft=10;fontSize=12;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#dae8fc;" value="updated_at : timestamptz ◀ re-arm signal" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="320" y="244" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="er1" edge="1" parent="1" source="t_users" style="edgeStyle=entityRelationEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;dashed=1;endArrow=ERone;startArrow=ERone;fontSize=11;" target="t_prof" value="1:1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="er2" edge="1" parent="1" source="t_prof" style="edgeStyle=entityRelationEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;dashed=1;endArrow=ERmany;startArrow=ERone;fontSize=11;" target="t_intake" value="1:N"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="er3" edge="1" parent="1" source="t_prof" style="edgeStyle=entityRelationEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;dashed=1;endArrow=ERone;startArrow=ERone;fontSize=11;" target="t_rem" value="1:1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="erd_note" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;spacing=8;fontSize=12;" value="CHANGES from the server-push design:
• push_subscriptions table DROPPED (no server push in v1).
• reminder_settings: dropped last_sent_at + its own timezone snapshot;
 profiles.timezone is the single canonical zone.
• reminder_settings.updated_at is the re-arm signal — clients re-read &
 re-schedule when it changes. A tz-change trigger touches it too.
• RLS owner-only (auth.uid()=user_id) on every table; canonical ml; totals AT TIME ZONE." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="175" width="410" x="850" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.div:
CHANGES from the server-push design:
• push_subscriptions table DROPPED (no server push in v1).
• reminder_settings: dropped last_sent_at + its own timezone snapshot;
profiles.timezone is the single canonical zone.
• reminder_settings.updated_at is the re-arm signal — clients re-read &
re-schedule when it changes. A tz-change trigger touches it too.
• RLS owner-only (auth.uid()=user_id) on every table; canonical ml; totals AT TIME ZONE.

a.text: Text is not SVG - cannot display
